case_title: JAYESH N. PATEL VS. JESSE DRIGGS

REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $183.30 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT DRIGGS, JESSE
